completed: Rewrote the omitted-context mixture lemma draft with a clearer narrative arc
Expanded the derivation so novice methodologists can follow the conditional averaging argument
Added an implications section explaining how the lemma supports later model-comparison results
why_it_matters: The mixture lemma is the first formal step connecting omitted context to the statistical target seen by model comparison.
A more readable proof draft is easier to review, teach, and later adapt into manuscript or SI prose.
